content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24021 with sector rotation favoring Pharma (+2.13%), Auto (+0.49%) and IT (+0.32%) while Energy lags. Breadth is constructive with VIX cooling to 17.81 and global cues firm (S&P +0.81%). Book is heavily deployed (67%) with 13 positions — focus is on managing existing book rather than adding aggressively.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.1% winner. SL already at 1030 (entry 984, locks in +4.7%). CMP 1045.60 — gap to SL is 1.5%, below the 1% trail floor minimum but acceptable given strong Q4 (PAT+18%, GNPA sub-1%). No-op effectively; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, sub-1% GNPA milestone, RBI easing tailwind. SL at 1030 locks +4.7%. Letting it run toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Modest -1% drawdown. SL at 119 (well below). Gold +1.36% today, thesis intact as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op; SL already at 1710 (above entry 1700, locks BE+0.6%). CMP 1727.70, near 52w high. Roadshow May 6-12 = volatility window. Holding existing levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 240,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 206.48 sitting right at SL 206. Stock closed near session lows after gapping down from 209 open; failing to hold the breakout. Better to exit now at -1.2% than wait for SL trigger which will likely fire on next downtick. Bank Nifty barely positive, no support."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op; SL already at 4600 (above entry 4575, locks BE+0.5%). +1.66% on day, defence sector strong. Q4 board May 14 is binary catalyst — will reassess closer to date. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op; SL already at 6960 (above entry 6900). Strong Q4 (PAT+114%), Geojit TP 8500. Holding for momentum continuation toward 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% currently. SL at 825 below entry 838 = -1.6% risk. Q4 results pending — binary catalyst. Tight 1.6% SL provides discipline; not trailing yet given small unrealized gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.1% intraday move (CMP 366.95 vs entry 369), now near breakeven. Q4 PAT +30%, NBFC AUM +27%. SL at 358 (-3% from entry). Letting thesis develop toward 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8% with strong Q4 (PAT+18%, India volume +9% best-in-class). SL 815 (-0.6% from entry). FMCG sector leadership thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3% drawdown but SL at 3245 only 0.1% below CMP 3255 — tight. Will likely either stop out or reverse. Q4 PAT+42% supportive. Letting SL do its work rather than panic-exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% with Q4 beat (revenue +30%, Encora consolidation starting). SL 1265 (+0.5% from entry, locks BE-ish). Letting it run toward 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% drawdown but defence thesis intact, Q4 PAT+24%, EBITDA margin +330bps. SL at 2950 (-2.5%) provides room. Bullish day +8.34% suggests momentum building."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%. Strong Q4 (record EBITDA margin 46.5%). SL 780 (-3.2%). Gap-up holding well, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY @133.50 placed 479min ago, stock now at 137.22 (well above limit). The order will not fill; should cancel rather than stack. No new HFCL entry — already chased. Letting pending order expire / be cancelled at EOD by squareoff logic. Not adding new exposure to telecom name post +8.87% gap."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",

    },

      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,

    {

    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "reasoning": "Recovered to near BE on +6% intraday move; SL provides room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, FMCG leadership; SL appropriate."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "SL locks BE+. Q4 beat catalyst playing out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Defence thesis intact; SL gives 2.5% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 780.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record, gap holding; SL provides 3% buffer."

  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA (+22%), AUROPHARMA, AJANTPHARM — pharma sector momentum strong (+2.13%) but no new entries today; book is already at 67% deployed across 13 names, sector cluster discipline limits more adds. NEULANDLAB Q4 May 12 binary — explicitly avoid pre-event entry at 52w-high zone. HFCL, CAMS, COFORGE all gap-ups already in book or already chased. Will reassess pharma entry post-Wockhardt clarity if pullback offers cleaner R:R.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 CNC positions, 67% deployed — at full diversification cap. Cluster check: 3 Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) + BANDHANBNK exiting = 3 financials post-exit, ~22% of book — acceptable. 2 Capital Goods (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE = 3) ~10% — acceptable. No new BUYs today: book is rich, market neutral, and priority is letting existing winners (PNBHOUSING +6%, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR) work. BANDHANBNK exit frees ~Rs 50k for next session. Cancel stale HFCL pending MIS order (479min old, price ran away). Performance context: 15% win rate over 5 days is poor — discipline is to NOT churn for action, let existing theses play out."
